_instructions: In The Punjab — Third Floor, Ambience Mall, Ambience Island, Sector 24, DLF Phase 3, Gurugram.
Menu extracted from 13 menu pages: Soups/Chaat, Veg Kebabs x2, Non-Veg Kebabs x2, Kebab Platters, Veg Curries x2, Non-Veg Curries x2, Biryani, Breads & Raita.
ITP = In The Punjab (e.g. ITP masala in Tandoori Pineapple).
